mapper.select: select user_id, avatar_url, nickname, gender, grade, college, major, interest_tags, bio, real_name, verified, verify_status from user_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select account from user_account where user_id = #{userId} and enabled = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_profile (user_id, avatar_url, nickname, gender, grade, college, major, interest_tags, bio, real_name, verified, verify_status) values (#{userId}, #{avatarUrl}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{grade}, #{college}, #{major}, #{interestTags}, #{bio}, #{realName}, 0, 'unverified')
mapper.update: update user_profile set avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, grade = #{grade}, college = #{college}, major = #{major}, interest_tags = #{interestTags}, bio = #{bio} where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select title, description, action_text from profile_campus_verify where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select label, icon, score, tone from profile_preference where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id
select activity_score as score, percentile from profile_activity_summary where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select day_label as day, activity_value as value from profile_activity_bar where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id
select status_label as status, credit_score, safety_level from profile_safety where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select item_text from profile_safety_item where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id

select c.conversation_id, case when c.starter_user_id = #{userId} then c.target_user_id else c.starter_user_id end as peer_user_id, left(coalesce(nullif(p.nickname, ''), '同'), 1) as avatar, coalesce(nullif(p.nickname, ''), '未命名用户') as name, coalesce(nullif(c.source_type, ''), '校园伙伴') as tag, coalesce(nullif(c.last_message, ''), '还没有聊天记录') as message, case when date(c.last_message_at) = curdate() then date_format(c.last_message_at, '%H:%i') when date(c.last_message_at) = date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day) then '昨天' else date_format(c.last_message_at, '%m-%d') end as time, m.unread_count as unread, case mod(c.conversation_id, 3) when 0 then 'warm' when 1 then 'pink' else 'green' end as tone from chat_conversation_member m join chat_conversation c on c.conversation_id = m.conversation_id join user_profile p on p.user_id = case when c.starter_user_id = #{userId} then c.target_user_id else c.starter_user_id end where m.user_id = #{userId} and m.archived = 0 order by c.last_message_at desc, c.conversation_id desc limit 3

select id as post_id, plaza, left(coalesce(nullif(category, ''), title), 1) as short_label, title, coalesce(nullif(category, ''), case when plaza = 'vent' then '倾诉' else '匹配' end) as tag, case when plaza = 'vent' then '倾诉广场' else '匹配广场' end as period, description, coalesce(nullif(expected_location, ''), '线上沟通') as location, case when date(created_at) = curdate() then date_format(created_at, '%H:%i') when date(created_at) = date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day) then '昨天' else date_format(created_at, '%m-%d') end as time, current_count as matched, case when plaza = 'vent' then 'sport' else 'study' end as tone from home_post where publisher_user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' order by created_at desc, id desc limit 2

select date_format(coalesce(reviewed_at, submitted_at), '%Y-%m-%d') from auth_center_record where user_id = #{userId} and auth_type = 'campus' and verified = 1 and status in ('approved', 'passed') order by coalesce(reviewed_at, submitted_at) desc, record_id desc limit 1

select count(1) from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id where r.status = 'approved' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible' and (r.requester_user_id = #{userId} or p.publisher_user_id = #{userId})

select date_format(r.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id where r.status = 'approved' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible' and (r.requester_user_id = #{userId} or p.publisher_user_id = #{userId}) order by r.updated_at desc, r.request_id desc limit 1

select count(1) from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id where r.status = 'approved' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible' and p.category like concat('%', #{categoryKeyword}, '%') and (r.requester_user_id = #{userId} or p.publisher_user_id = #{userId})

select date_format(r.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id where r.status = 'approved' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible' and p.category like concat('%', #{categoryKeyword}, '%') and (r.requester_user_id = #{userId} or p.publisher_user_id = #{userId}) order by r.updated_at desc, r.request_id desc limit 1

select count(1) from home_post_reply r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and r.deleted = 0 and r.review_status = 'visible' and p.plaza = 'vent' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible'

select date_format(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') from home_post_reply r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and r.deleted = 0 and r.review_status = 'visible' and p.plaza = 'vent' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible' order by r.created_at desc, r.id desc limit 1
